parameter_description: The probability of extra drum hits being generated
notes: can be used in conjunction with zoom, midpoint, and range to create drum fills that transition organically from a simple beat

parameter_description: Chooses which subdivision of the beat should be affected by the randomly generated extra hits
The range of velocities which will be assigned to the random hits
The average velocity of the randomly generated hits
notes: If you set the midpoint to maximum and have range set at zero, all the randomly generated hits will be at max velocity. Conversely, if you set it at zero, some hits will be muted. Setting it somewhere in the middle (with non-zero range) will add some random hits while reducing the volume of others.

parameter_description: Alters the playback speed of the samples
notes: Will play samples backwards if you turn the knob below halfway

parameter_description: Crops the end of the samples, creating a staccato effect
Mutes some or all of the drum channels
notes: Allows you to quickly "drop" everything except the hi-hat and snare, for example, or only retain the kick drum. Broadly, this control has "treble-y" channels at one end and "bass-y" channels at the other. The setting corresponding to all the channels being audible is somewhere in the middle.

parameter_description: Generates a drone which can be mixed with the drum sounds
The drone can be used to modulate the audio signal from the drums, creating a robotic effect
Controls the overall tuning of the drones
Alter the root note of the drones, in semitone steps over an octave range
Chooses between a series of basic underlying drum patterns
Alters the time signature of the beat
notes: 1-13 beats per bar. all the way to the right, the time signature will be randomised at the start of each bar

parameter_description: Creates a swing feel to a beat by altering the timing of certain hits
Alters the tempo (BPM) of the beat
notes: Will override any tempo previously set using the tap tempo function
